prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response:
# The Eight-Armed Hug

Deep beneath the swaying seaweed forest, where sunlight danced in ribbons across the ocean floor, lived an octopus named Ollie. Ollie was different from the other sea creatures—not just because of his eight wiggly arms or his ability to change colors like a living rainbow—but because he was terribly, tremendously shy. Whenever fish swam by his cozy cave, Ollie would turn the exact shade of the rocks and press himself against the wall, his heart thumping like tiny bubbles popping. More than anything in the whole wide ocean, Ollie wished he could make friends, but the thought of introducing himself made all eight of his arms tremble. Still, every morning when he woke up, he would practice his smile in the reflection of a shiny shell and whisper, "Maybe today will be the day I'm brave enough to say hello."
